title: Vision Sequence Selection
description:
Vision Sequence Selection

Vision Sequence Selection

Before you can run a vision sequence you will need to select the vision sequence which you want to run.  Upon opening an existing Epson RC+ project, the vision sequence which you were last working on will remain as the active vision sequence for use in the Vision Guide window.  However, if you need to work on a different vision sequence, this can be done by selecting the vision sequence from the drop down list box which is found at the top of the Sequence tab.  This drop down list box makes it easy to change between vision sequences within a project.
